query: SELECT u.id, u.name, up.gender, up.age_range, up.occupation, up.budget, up.style_preferences, up.onboarding_completed FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.user_id ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
